# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  - another-api.example.net
  addresses:
  - 35.197.149.125/32
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
  - db1.example.com
  - db2.example.net
  addresses:
  - 35.197.149.126/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgresql
    protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-svc-1
spec:
  hosts:
  - svc1.example.net
  addresses:
  - 35.197.149.127/32
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-svc-2
spec:
  hosts:
  - svc2.example.com
  addresses:
  - 35.197.149.128/32
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: /path
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.example.com
        port:
          number: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
  - db1.example.com
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: /path
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db1.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-svc-1
spec:
  hosts:
  - svc1.example.net
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: /path
    route:
    - destination:
        host: svc1.example.net
        port:
          number: 8080

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-svc-2
spec:
  hosts:
  - svc2.example.com
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: /path
    route:
    - destination:
        host: svc2.example.com
        port:
          number: 80
